approvedBy: Steve full-steam Standard-mode overnight Foundation instruction + Codex senior-engineer guardrail
notes: Approved as a no-auth Foundation Runtime Health simplification card. Scope: add a plain-English command panel, attention-only summary, direct jump actions, and collapsed diagnostic groups while preserving existing Runtime Health details and route behavior. Not approved: backend route changes, auth changes, job/runtime semantic changes, source extraction, connector auth, hub feature work, Canva asset-library behavior, Marketing Video Lab wiring, Build Intel extraction, Meeting Vault Phase B, Drive permission mutation, or auto-restart-on-push install. Plan was clarified before build with explicit no-new-runtime-controls, no-diagnostic-deletion, and performance-proof acceptance wording; scope did not expand.
